What I Bring

Core Competencies

🗣️

Communication & Public Speaking

Served as official Host for two national-level PATA Bangladesh events — BrandElevate and Product Maestro — demonstrating confident public communication and stage presence before large audiences.

🤝

Leadership & Team Coordination

Led multi-city volunteer programmes across four districts as Event Organiser, managing cross-functional teams, schedules, and logistics — delivering consistent results in diverse environments.

🏢

Corporate Relations & Outreach

As Deputy Head of Corporate Affairs at PATA BD DU Student Chapter, built partnerships, managed sponsorship acquisition, and represented the organisation in external stakeholder engagements.

📋

Programme & Project Management

Managed budgets, tracked expenses, created financial records, and coordinated schedules across an ongoing children's education programme — ensuring accountability and smooth operations since 2021.

💡

Critical Thinking & Problem Solving

Recognised as a finalist in the national Tourism Idea Challenge, developing innovative industry solutions through structured research and collaborative strategy — presenting to an expert panel.

🌱

Community Development & Social Impact

Delivered moral and educational lessons to 20 underprivileged children, and organised Greenaugurate — a national sustainability fest attracting 3,000+ students, with 179 plants gifted to faculty.

About Me

Who is Johana Parna?

I am an MBA candidate at the University of Dhaka (Semester 1 GPA: 3.70), with a BBA background in management — and a track record of leading people, managing programmes, and building relationships across corporate and non-profit environments.

My strength is people. Whether I'm hosting a national event, coordinating volunteers across four cities, managing a community programme, or building corporate partnerships — I bring clarity, energy, and follow-through. I'm actively seeking roles in HR, Management Trainee programmes, NGO development, or corporate operations.

Beyond the professional, I am a creative — I illustrate with Adobe Illustrator, hold a French language certificate, and believe diverse skills make a stronger professional.

I am actively seeking roles in HR (Recruitment, HR Operations, L&D), Management Trainee programmes, NGO programme coordination, corporate administration, and operations management. My background in managing people, coordinating programmes, and building stakeholder relationships makes me well-suited across these functions.
I combine academic rigour (MBA, CGPA 3.40 BBA) with real-world leadership — I have hosted national events, managed multi-city volunteer programmes, handled budgets, and built corporate partnerships. I also bring a creative dimension through Adobe Illustrator and a French language certificate. I don't just study management — I practise it.
Absolutely. You can reach me at johanasarkarparna@gmail.com or call 01571027110 and I will send my CV right away. You can also connect via LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johana-sarkar-parna-35b2a81a1
Yes — my volunteering work has already taken me to Kushtia, Chattagram, Satkhira, and Bandarban. I am comfortable working in field-based, hybrid, or remote settings and am open to relocating for the right opportunity.
I am in my final semester of MBA and will be fully available upon completion from July. I am open to internships, part-time roles, or project-based engagements starting now. Please feel free to reach out and we can work around timing.
